Focus Group: NBD Discovery Session | NBD Data Team
Content: R: process: lack of standardize data entry due to lack of processes. Codes staff notes make it hard to parse data. System training & support. Lack of automation: BAA process is manual, automatic double fines. Workflow related. Lack of sys use for cross dept  projects: law dept. Camino & Ips makes in difficult for continutity. Timely sys update, literally years to solve anything. IT have to manually go into each sys and there could be a bug. It is clunky, easy to accidentally break things: deactive rec type, SPCC book, lack of data validation, things missing. Limited ability to associate inspection types with case type. Resubs occure limitations. Limited track organise cases based on unit level. Address book cant add related address if already exist. BAA only can track things on case level only, but we need more. If one violation is correct but other exists, it is very challenging and messy.
